attributes.Sql Query:
select 
 SBA.PNR_LOCATOR1 as BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID        
,SBA.CUSTOMER_ID1 as BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID           
,SBA.PAX_SEQUENCE1 as BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT      
,SBA.GDS_CODE1 as BK_AMEX_GDS_CD                
,SBA.FLT_SEQUENCE as BK_BOOKING_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT
,SBA.FLT_ARRIVE as SEGMENT_ARRIVAL_DTM           
,SBA.FLT_DEPART as SEGMENT_DEPARTURE_DTM         
,case when FLT_TYPE ='R' then Coalesce(NIRO.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD,trim(SBA.FLT_ORIGIN),'-99' ) else '=' end  AS  RU_PASSAGE_ORIGN_RAIL_STN_CD  
,case when FLT_TYPE ='R' then Coalesce( NIRD.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD,trim(SBA.FLT_DESTINATION),'-99' ) else '=' end  as RU_PASSAGE_DESTN_RAIL_STN_CD 
,SBA.CONVERTED_AMOUNT as SEGMENT_FARE_REPORTING_AMT    
,SBA.FLT_ORIGINAL_AMOUNT as SEGMENT_FARE_LOCAL_AMT        
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then Coalesce(NIAO.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,trim(SBA.FLT_ORIGIN),'-99' ) else '='end as RU_FLIGHT_ORGN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD 
,SBA.FLT_CONNECT_TIME as  SEGMENT_CONNECT_WAIT_MINS_CNT  
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then Coalesce( NIAD.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,trim(SBA.FLT_DESTINATION),'-99' ) else '=' end as RU_FLIGHT_DSTN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD 
,SBA.FLT_ELAPSED_TIME as SEGMENT_ELAPSED_MINUTES_CNT   
,COALESCE(SBA.FLT_DOM_INTL,'=') as SEGMENT_DOMESTIC_INTRNTNL_CD  
,COALESCE(SBA.FLT_STATUS,'=') as SEGMENT_STATUS_CD             
,COALESCE(SBA.FLIGHT_CONNECT_CODE,'=') as SEGMENT_CONNECTION_FLG       
,SBA.FLT_FF as  REWARDS_PROGRAM_NUM           
,COALESCE(SBA.FLT_MEAL,'=') as  MEAL_SERVED_FLG               
,SBA.FLT_SEAT as SEGMENT_SEAT_NUM              
,COALESCE(SBA.FLT_MILES,0) as SEGMENT_MILES_CNT             
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then 'AIR'  when FLT_TYPE ='R' then 'RAIL' else 'UNKN'  end as  BOOKING_SEGMENT_TYPE          
,COALESCE(NISOLC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK')   as  LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD             
,COALESCE( NACOS.BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,trim(SBA.FLT_CLASS_TYPE),'Z')  as  BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD   
,COALESCE(NAFT.BK_FARE_TYPE_CD ,trim(SBA.FLT_FAREBASIS_TYPE),'Z') AS FARE_TYPE_CD                 
,COALESCE(NISOCC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE ,'UNK')    as  REPORTING_CURRENCY_CD       
,COALESCE(NICFROM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,trim(SBA.FROM_COUNTRY),'UNK') as SEGMENT_ORIGIN_ISO_COUNTRY_CD
,COALESCE(NICTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,trim(SBA.TO_COUNTRY),'UNK') as SEGMENT_DEST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD
, case when ( SBA.FLT_WAITLIST_CLS is not null or SBA.FLT_WAITLIST_CXR is not null )then  'Y' else 'N'end as WAITLIST_ROLE       
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then SBA.FLT_NUMBER    else '=' end  as  RU_FLIGHT_NUM                 
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then SBA.FLT_EQUIPMENT else '=' end  as RU_FLIGHT_EQUIPMENT_CD        
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then SBA.FLT_SEAT_TYPE else '=' end  as  RU_FLIGHT_SEAT_TYPE_CD        
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then SBA.FLT_FAREBASIS else '=' end as   RU_FLIGHT_FARE_BASIS_CD       
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then SBA.FLT_CLASS else '=' end as   RU_FLIGHT_SERVICE_CLASS_CD    
,case when FLT_TYPE ='A' then SBA.FLT_CARRIER else '=' end as RU_IATA_AIRLINE_CD            
,SBA.FLT_WAITLIST_CLS as RU_SEGMENT_WAITLIST_STATUS_CD 
,SBA.FLT_WAITLIST_CXR as RU_SEGMENT_WAITLIST_CARRIER_CD
,case when FLT_TYPE ='R' then SBA.FLT_NUMBER else '='  end as RU_TRAIN_NUM                  
,case when FLT_TYPE ='R' then SBA.FLT_CARRIER else '=' end as RU_AMEX_RAIL_CARRIER_CD
,'I' as ACTION_CODE	
,'I' as DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BOOKED_AIR  SBA
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_BOOKED_INVOICE EBI  
		ON (EBI.CUSTOMER_ID4 = SBA.CUSTOMER_ID1 
					AND EBI.GDS_CODE4 = SBA.GDS_CODE1 
					AND EBI.PAX_SEQUENCE4 = SBA.PAX_SEQUENCE1
					AND EBI.PNR_LOCATOR4 = SBA.PNR_LOCATOR1		       )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NISOLC
	ON (  SBA .ORIGINAL_CURRENCY                =  NISOLC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE 
	       and NISOLC.END_TV_DATE= '3500-01-01') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE NACOS
 	ON   SBA.FLT_CLASS_TYPE   = NACOS.BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_FARE_TYPE NAFT
	ON   SBA.FLT_FAREBASIS_TYPE  = NAFT.BK_FARE_TYPE_CD  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY_TV NISOCC
 on ( EBI.CONVERTED_CURRENCY2 =  NISOCC.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  
        and NISOCC.END_TV_DATE= '3500-01-01')  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IATA_AIRPORT NIAD
	ON SBA.FLT_DESTINATION = NIAD.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IATA_AIRPORT NIAO
	ON SBA.FLT_ORIGIN = NIAO.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD     
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCFROM
 ON  SBA.FROM_COUNTRY = ETCFROM. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE  
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICFROM
 on ETCFROM.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICFROM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE    
LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCTO
 ON  SBA.TO_COUNTRY = ETCTO. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICTO
 on ETCTO.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICTO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE   
Inner Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING  NATB  
	ON   (	NATB.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID        =  SBA.PNR_LOCATOR1
				and NATB.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD        =  SBA.GDS_CODE1
				and NATB.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID           = SBA.CUSTOMER_ID1
				and NATB.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT      =SBA.PAX_SEQUENCE1  
          )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RAIL_STATION NIRD
	ON SBA.FLT_DESTINATION = NIRD.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD               
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RAIL_STATION NIRO
	ON SBA.FLT_ORIGIN = NIRO.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
XPK_ROW1,
FK_TRAVEL1,
FLT_CARRIER,
ORIGINAL_CURRENCY,
FLT_WAITLIST_CXR,
FLT_SEAT_TYPE,
FLT_MILES,
PNR_LOCATOR1,
FLT_WAITLIST_CLS,
PAX_SEQUENCE1,
FLT_SEAT,
FLIGHT_CONNECT_CODE,
FLT_ARRIVE,
FLT_CLASS,
TO_COUNTRY,
FLT_MEAL,
FLT_SEQUENCE,
FLT_FF,
FLT_EQUIPMENT,
FLT_ORIGIN,
FLT_DOM_INTL,
FLT_NUMBER,
FLT_STATUS,
FLT_ORIGINAL_AMOUNT,
FLT_FAREBASIS_TYPE,
FLT_FAREBASIS,
FLT_ELAPSED_TIME,
FLT_CLASS_TYPE,
CONVERTED_AMOUNT,
FROM_COUNTRY,
CONVERTED_CURRENCY,
FLT_TYPE,
GDS_CODE1,
FLT_CONNECT_TIME,
FLT_DEPART,
FLT_DESTINATION,
CUSTOMER_ID1,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BOOKED_AIR SBA
WHERE NOT 
 EXISTS
           (  SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING  NATB  
	            WHERE NATB.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID  = SBA.PNR_LOCATOR1
		         and NATB.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD           = SBA.GDS_CODE1
		         and NATB.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID      = SBA.CUSTOMER_ID1
		         and NATB.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT = SBA.PAX_SEQUENCE1  
	        )
